notableEvents.label: Christian Walker reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Christian Walker reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Zack Gelof. Yordan Alvarez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Isaac Paredes GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Isaac Paredes grounds into a double play, third baseman Zack Gelof to second baseman Jeff McNeil to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Christian Walker out at 2nd. Isaac Paredes out at 1st.
